  "findings": [
    "Conductors installed in a wet location do not have the required wet-rated insulation type (e.g., THWN, XHHW) as specified by NEC."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the non-compliant conductors from the wet location conduit/raceway.",
    "Replace with conductors having appropriate wet-location rated insulation (such as THWN-2 or XHHW-2) in accordance with NEC Table 310.16 and Section 310.10."
  ],
  "rationale": "The installation of conductors without a wet-location rating in a wet location violates NEC requirements, posing a high risk of insulation degradation, short circuits, and ground faults over time.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 310.10"
  ]
}
